visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman sits on the floor of a home interior, surrounded by numerous cardboard boxes and packages. She is wearing a white T-shirt with a My Melody graphic and light-colored shorts. She waves her hands and smiles at the camera in a brightly lit room with wooden shelves in the background. (2) She picks up a black shopping bag branded with 'Threads,' removes a folded white shirt and several cards, and then places a small black-and-white party hat on her head. (3) She holds up a blue box from 'STANDARD SEOUL,' opening it to reveal a clear bottle of skincare serum containing yellow capsules. (4) She displays a pink 'BearQueen' box, takes out a cookie topped with a dried strawberry, and takes a bite. (5) She presents 'SLIGHT' brand skincare products, specifically a bottle of makeup remover oil and a green box of acne patches. (6) She holds up two gold and white jars of 'La Glow' neck cream that she pulled from a white delivery box. (7) She opens a small cardboard box from 'ATHE' and shows a small frosted green bottle of facial essence. (8) She struggles with her tight party hat while picking up a large pink 'dasique' bag, which she opens to reveal a large multi-colored lip and cheek palette. She applies some of the product to her lips and cheek. (9) She shows boxes and compacts of 'Mude' highlighter, demonstrating the shimmer on her arm. (10) She holds up two large bags of 'Da Wu Shan Ranch' snacks, opening the strawberry flavor and eating a piece of the crispy cake stick. (11) She displays a purple box of 'Paperbag' health supplements, opens a packet to show three dark tablets, and eats one. (12) She presents 'Vive Lab' anti-hair loss shampoo and demonstrates an accompanying scalp massage roller on her head. (13) She shows 'MOEV' shampoo and several packs of 'SEXYLOOK' facial masks. (14) She holds up a large transparent '喜年來' (Hsi Nien Lai) snack bag containing a chili plush toy and multiple snack packs, then eats a chip. (15) She displays large 'YOUNGRANU' meal replacement shake bags and individual pouches in various colors. (16) She holds up 'Foodology' jelly sticks and 'JULIE'S CHOICE' health supplements, eventually drinking a small bottle of collagen. (17) The camera pans over the extremely messy floor covered in discarded boxes and packaging. The woman waves goodbye looking slightly overwhelmed before the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 40萬網紅的公關品開箱. [Slogan]: PR Haul by a 400k Influencer. (2) [Subtitle]: 公關品開箱. [Slogan]: 影片中有抽獎! ❤️. (3) [Subtitle]: 我這次回韓國的2週期間中. (4) [Subtitle]: 這麼多東西寄到家裡. (5) [Subtitle]: 都是公關品或者是品牌先給. (6) [Variety]: (已累). (7) [Subtitle]: (品牌先寄給我的) 試吃品 & 試用品. (8) [Subtitle]: 一起開箱看看. (9) [Logo]: Threads. (10) [Logo]: STANDARD SEOUL. [Subtitle]: 長得很神奇. (11) [Logo]: BearQueen 熊后. [Subtitle]: 草莓口味牛嘎餅乾. (12) [Logo]: SLIGHT. [Subtitle]: 卸妝油 & 痘痘貼. (13) [Logo]: La Glow. [Subtitle]: 天鵝頸緻霜. (14) [Logo]: ATHE. [Subtitle]: 不是保健品，是精華. (15) [Logo]: dasique. [Variety]: (太緊了). [Logo]: Chewing Glow Pot. (16) [Subtitle]: 當唇彩或當腮紅使用都OK. (17) [Variety]: ☕ 進行抽獎. [Slogan]: 參與辦法：請底下留言「下次想看的Reels題材」抽10位贈送一個單品. (18) [Logo]: Mude. [Subtitle]: 打亮. (19) [Logo]: 大武山牧場. [Subtitle]: 草莓蜂蜜蛋糕酥條. (20) [Subtitle]: 吃起來像是吐司脆片加上雞蛋蛋糕的綜合口味. (21) [Subtitle]: 雞蛋小鬆餅 (咖啡歐蕾). (22) [Logo]: Paperbag. [Subtitle]: 紫草油護理嚼錠. (23) [Subtitle]: 味道很像葡萄軟糖欸!!. (24) [Logo]: vive lab. [Subtitle]: 防落髮洗髮精 + 按摩滾輪組. (25) [Logo]: MOEV. [Logo]: SEXYLOOK. (26) [Logo]: 喜年來. [Subtitle]: 爽辣V餅乾青花椒口味. (27) [Subtitle]: 完全是我的菜 😍. (28) [Logo]: YOUNGRANU. [Subtitle]: 🇰🇷 韓國的奶昔. (29) [Subtitle]: 蛋白質超多，但超好吃. (30) [Subtitle]: 開心果，巧克力，玉米芝麻，艾草等等有多種口味. (31) [Subtitle]: 可能8月會進行團購? 記得關注我的IG!!!. (32) [Logo]: Foodology. [Subtitle]: 輕盈果凍. (33) [Logo]: JULIE'S CHOICE. [Subtitle]: 皮膚用保健品. (34) [Variety]: GOOD !!!. [Subtitle]: 膠原蛋白飲. (35) [Subtitle]: 但這些要怎麼整理... (36) [Variety]: (蛤...). (37) [Variety]: (隨便吧 ~).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female influencer appearing as the main creator.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long brown hair, wearing a white My Melody graphic t-shirt and grey lounge shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home interior scene where the floor is covered with a massive pile of cardboard boxes, shopping bags, and packing materials. A wooden shelving unit and a plain wall are visible behind the subject.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music featuring a driving synthesizer beat and sharp percussion begins immediately. A female voice speaks with high energy, high pitch, and rapid delivery. Audible sounds of hand clapping and intense plastic/paper rustling accompany her movements. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect punctuates the transition as text overlays appear. The speaker maintains a clear, enthusiastic volume. More frequent rustling and soft thudding sounds occur as cardboard boxes are handled and placed. (3) A distinct crunching sound is clearly heard as the subject bites into a cookie, followed by a positive vocal reaction. The BGM maintains a steady, energetic tempo. (4) Loud rustling of large plastic shopping bags creates a textured background sound. The speaker's pitch modulates higher as she explains various skincare products. (5) A technical 'pop' sound effect plays. The sound of a makeup compact being clicked open is audible. The music continues with bright spectral weight and consistent beat strength. (6) More crunching sounds from snacking on chips, accompanied by the rustling of snack foil. A liquid swallowing sound occurs as she drinks from a supplement bottle. (7) The speaker's tone shifts slightly toward exhaustion at the end, followed by a final cheerful farewell. The BGM fades out with a final synthesized percussive hit.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Itemized Product Sequence -> Summary -> Call-to-Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a large volume of PR packages received by the influencer, providing brief demonstrations and reviews of beauty products, snacks, and health supplements to promote the brands and engage followers through a giveaway.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Influencer explicitly opening and demonstrating multiple gifted products from various brands with logos visible.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy social media 'unboxing' haul with fast cuts and dense visual/audio information aimed at maintaining high viewer retention.
